cb: bun create better-fullstack@latest <name> --ecosystem typescript --frontend <frontend> --backend <backend> --runtime <runtime> --api <api> --database <db> --orm <orm> --auth <auth> --css-framework <css> --ui-library <ui> --payments none --email none --file-upload none --effect none --state-management none --validation zod --forms none --testing vitest --ai none --realtime none --job-queue none --animation none --logging none --observability none --analytics none --cms none --caching none --search none --file-storage none --addons none --examples none --ai-docs none --db-setup none --web-deploy none --server-deploy none --package-manager bun --no-install --no-git --disable-analytics

notes: Non-shadcn-focused TypeScript mix batch (10 combos) to broaden coverage across UI libraries/backends/APIs/runtimes
Validation per combo: bts.jsonc records css/ui + bun install + bun run check-types
BugU_react_icons_dep: React web templates import icon components based on shadcnIconLibrary even when uiLibrary is not shadcn-ui; icon deps were not added for non-shadcn UI libs
Fix: add icon dependency injection for React/Astro-React projects in processUILibraryDeps using config.shadcnIconLibrary
BugV_nitro_trpc_context: trpc nitro route passes createContext({ req }), but trpc context template had no nitro backend branch (signature/type mismatch, ctx.session typed never)
Fix: add nitro branch in trpc context template with Request-based context and better-auth session fetch
Local CLI re-test after fixes: 2/2 previously failing combos passed

rows: BugU_react_icons_dep: missing icon deps (lucide-react by default) for non-shadcn UI libraries in React web templates
BugV_nitro_trpc_context: createContext signature mismatch in trpc nitro templates and auth session typing collapse
